What We Do

Services & Pricing

Transparent pricing, no hidden fees. Starting rates shown — final quote provided before any work begins.

Auto Detailing

Essential Wash

$75 sedan · SUV from $95

The right refresh when you don't need a full detail. Exterior hand wash, wheels, tires, and interior vacuum.

  • Exterior hand wash & dry
  • Wheel & tire clean + dressing
  • Interior vacuum
  • Windows inside & out
Book This
Most Popular

Auto Detailing

Full Detail

$225 sedan · SUV/Truck from $275

Complete inside-and-out transformation. We take our time — no rush, no shortcuts.

  • Full exterior wash & spray wax
  • Wheel, tire & wheel well clean
  • Deep interior vacuum & wipe-down
  • Carpet & fabric cleaning (as needed)
  • Leather conditioning
  • All glass streak-free
Book This

Pressure Washing

Driveway & Concrete

$120 up to 1,000 sq ft

Remove years of oil, mold, and grime from concrete, asphalt, and pavers.

  • High-pressure concrete clean
  • Pre-treatment for stains & algae
  • Sidewalks & walkways included
  • +$0.08/sq ft over 1,000 sq ft
Book This

Pressure Washing

House Exterior

$250 up to 2,000 sq ft

Soft wash technique — safe on vinyl, fiber cement, and wood siding. Kills mold at the root.

  • Soft wash, vinyl-safe low pressure
  • Mold, algae & mildew treatment
  • Gutter face & eave rinse
  • Covered entryways & porches
Book This

Commercial

Fleet & Semi

Custom quote required

We come to your lot — no downtime hauling vehicles. Service vans, box trucks, Kenworth semis, and more.

  • Cab interior full detail
  • Exterior wash & spray wax
  • Trailer wash available
  • Recurring fleet scheduling
Get a Quote

Add-Ons

Extras

From $25

Upgrade any service with professional add-ons.

  • Pet hair removal — $40
  • Headlight restoration — $35/pair
  • Ceramic spray coating — $75
  • Paint decontamination — $50
  • Odor bomb treatment — $30
  • Deck / patio wash — from $85
Add to Booking
Pricing Note: All prices are starting rates. Final price may vary based on vehicle size, condition, and travel distance. A quote is always confirmed before work begins — no surprises.
